card1Text: Experimente o idioma e a cultura em primeira pessoa

card2.title: Conecte-se aos seus interesses
card2.paragraph: Integre o espanhol na sua rotina diária, nos seus hobbies e paixões

card2.title: Aprenda fazendo
card2.paragraph: Aumente a sua fluência com projetos, atividades e conversas com nativos

card2.title: Viaje e descubra a cultura
card2.paragraph: Conheça países de língua espanhola com professores e guias turísticos

card2.title: Junte-se à nossa comunidade
card2.paragraph: Converse sobre seus tópicos favoritos com professores e estudantes

card3Text: Aprender espanhol não se trata apenas de lições e gramática. Mergulhe na cultura dos países de língua espanhola. Dessa forma, você conseguirá falar fluentemente enquanto desfruta de experiências únicas.

card4.title: O que oferecemos
card4.text: Descubra os serviços que projetamos especialmente para a sua aprendizagem

card4.title: NOSSOS PROGRAMAS
card4.text: Explore nossos programas e amplie sua perspectiva
card4.paragraph: Alcance a fluência em espanhol com cursos adaptados ao seu nível e objetivos. Desfrute de aulas interativas com professores apaixonados pela cultura e pelo idioma.
list: Cursos personalizados de acordo com o seu nível de espanhol.
Imersão cultural em países de língua espanhola.

card4.title: DESCUBRA CÓRDOBA
card4.text: Explore a beleza de Córdoba com nossas atividades presenciais
card4.paragraph: Descubra a cultura de Córdoba enquanto aprimora seu espanhol. Experimente uma fusão de aprendizado e turismo nesta bela província da Argentina.
list: Descobrir locais emblemáticos por meio da imersão na cultura local.
Desfrutar de eventos e atividades exclusivas do Español con E.
Praticar espanhol com falantes nativos e conhecer novas pessoas.
card4.messageModal: Viva a experiência única do turismo linguístico. Saiba mais sobre nossa viagem em abril de 2024. Cadastre-se para receber informações exclusivas.

card42.title: PT Discover our early bird plans
card42.text: PT Unlock the perks of being among our first users for a limited time. Try our platform’s features and exclusive programs.

card43Title: ES Experience language and culture in Córdoba
card43SubTitle: ES Get to know this beautiful province of Argentina while perfecting your Spanish.
card43Paragraph0: ES Join our trip in June 2024 and enjoy a unique mix of learning and tourism. You will have the opportunity to:
card43List: ES Discover iconic places through immersion in the local culture.
Enjoy Español con E’s exclusive events and activities.
Practice Spanish with native speakers and meet new people.
card43Paragraph1: ES Become one of the first to receive exclusive information and save your spot!

card6.title: Não confie apenas em nossas palavras
card6.sentence: Leia o que nossos alunos têm a dizer sobre sua experiência conosco.

card6.name: Lisa J.
card6.paragraph: Before studying with Espanol con E, I had an intermediate level of Spanish. However, since I have been studying with them, I feel my Spanish skills have remarkably improved.  As a physician, my goal was and is to be able to communicate with my Spanish speaking patients.  Thanks to Espanol con E, I am much more fluent and confident in my Spanish communication skills.  ¡Muchísimas gracias a Espanol con E!

card6.name: Tom C.
card6.paragraph: My experience with Español con E has been excelente!  The learning is targeted to meet the needs of each individual student.  There is always a focus on keeping it fun.  During my on-line session Eucaris is always cheerful, patient, and encouraging.  I've been studying Spanish as a personal interest for years, and this is the best class experience I have had.  I am able to utilize the skills in everyday life in Houston, TX and also during my time as a volunteer.  In addition, I think learning a second language is good exercise for the brain.  Te lo recomiendo mucho Español con E.

card6.name: Kayla D.
card6.paragraph: My daughters and I have been studying Spanish with Eucaris for more than two years now, and we have all improved so much. I think we've stuck with our studies this long because Eucaris offers lessons that consider our individual interests and language needs. She has pushed me to work toward goals to use my Spanish skills in my job, and she supports me in reaching those goals through relevant activities, assignments, and feedback. Español with E is helping my family become truly bilingual!

card6.name: Dave B.
card6.paragraph: It has been almost two years that I have been learning Spanish with Español Con E (Señora Rodríguez). I had some basic knowledge of Spanish, however ever since I started with Español con E my Spanish skills have incredibly improved. It has been a long time dream of mine to be able to speak, and write Spanish. I can honestly say that it has been a wonderful experience. At times very challenging, but we’ve worked through it all with her patience, professionalism, honesty, and most of all her sincerity. I have the outmost respect for her and her organization.Thank you.

modalEmailLanding: Insira seu e-mail para enviar mais detalhes.
